title: Heatwave cool-hours work schedule
summary: Move heavy tasks to the coolest practical hours, add water and shade breaks, use a buddy check, and reduce workload for vulnerable people.
content: Move heavy tasks to the coolest practical hours, add water and shade breaks, use a buddy check, and reduce workload for vulnerable people. Stop activity and seek urgent help for confusion, fainting, seizures, collapse, or severe worsening. Do not push through symptoms to finish a shift or journey.
